data.title: Wells Fargo predicts $150B inflow into Bitcoin and risk assets from surge in retail risk-taking post higher US tax refunds.
data.description: According to a strategist from Wells Fargo, the possibility of larger US tax refunds may lead to increased risk-taking in the retail sector by the end of March. This could result in a flow of new funds into assets like Bitcoin and momentum stocks.

data.title: KBR and Petro Rabigh sign 10-year maintenance contract for Saudi Arabia polymer plants.
data.description: In Houston on February 18, 2026, KBR (NYSE: KBR) and Rabigh Refining & Petrochemical Company (Petro Rabigh) revealed a significant collaboration - a 10-year general maintenance services agreement, with the potential for a two-year extension. This deal focuses on maintaining the operations of Petro Rabigh Polymer I and Polymer II plants based in Rabigh, Saudi Arabia.

data.title: UK EXPERTS-ALS platform picks CervoMed's neflamapimod for evaluation in treating Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis.
data.description: Neflamapimod, a product of CervoMed, has been chosen to undergo rapid evaluation in Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis (ALS) through the EXPERTS-ALS platform in the United Kingdom. This selection highlights the potential of neflamapimod in treating ALS, a progressive neurodegenerative disease affecting nerve cells in the brain and spinal cord. This collaboration underscores the significance of advancing research and development in ALS treatment.
Auddia finalizes merger deal, combining businesses in a definitive agreement.

data.title: Constellium reports strong Q4 and FY 2025; Provides full-year 2026 guidance. Stock symbol: CSTM.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, in Paris, Constellium SE (NYSE: CSTM) released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2025.

data.title: First Atlantic closes first tranche of LIFE private placement, raising $3.07M with CEO's 1.0M share subscription.
data.description: First Atlantic has successfully closed the initial portion of the LIFE private placement, raising gross proceeds totaling $3.07 million without incurring any fees. The CEO demonstrated confidence in the offering by subscribing for 1.0 million shares.

data.title: K92 Mining expands near-mine infrastructure with Dilatant Zone, reports significant depth extension from first Deep Drill Program, & multiple high-grade intersections at Kora and Judd.
data.description: K92 Mining has announced a significant expansion of the near-mine dilatant zone. The deep drill results have unveiled a substantial depth extension, with multiple high-grade intersections at both the Kora and Judd sites. This development marks a pivotal moment for the company, with the potential for increased production and profitability. The expansion project is set to enhance the company's operations by tapping into new resources and maximizing the existing mineral reserves. The recent findings indicate promising prospects, with notable shafts exhibiting high-grade mineralization. This expansion effort signifies a strategic move by K92 Mining to capitalize on the rich mineral deposits in the region. The company's proactive approach to exploration and development is expected to yield positive results in terms of production output and revenue generation. Investors and stakeholders can look forward to the anticipated growth and success facilitated by these recent discoveries.

data.title: Global-e reports record Q4 and FY 2025 results: Q4 GMV $2.36 billion, revenue $336.7 million, EBITDA up 53% to $87.2 million. FY 2025 GMV $6.57 billion, revenue $962.2 million, EBITDA up 41% to $198.5 million. Positive outlook for 2026 with revenue growth of close to 30%. Full story: https://www.benzinga.com/pressreleases/26/02/g27504657/global-e-reports-record-fourth-quarter-and-full-year-results-for-2025
data.description: Global-e Online Ltd. reported their financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. In Q4 2025, GMV was $2,361 million, a 37.8% YoY increase, revenue was $336.7 million, a 28% YoY increase, and Adjusted EBITDA increased by 53% YoY to $87.2 million. For the full year 2025, GMV was $6,569 million, revenue was $962.2 million, and Adjusted EBITDA increased by 41% YoY to $198.5 million. They also completed $72 million of share repurchases in Q4 2025. Global-e outlined exciting initiatives for 2026, forecasting revenue growth acceleration to close to 30% and significant bottom line margin expansion. They highlighted the launch of Managed Markets 2.0 and expanding services and technologies. For Q1 2026 and FY 2026, they provided guidance with GMV expected to be $1,705 - $1,745 million and $8,450 - $8,800 million, revenue $247 - $254 million and $1,211 - $1,271 million, and Adjusted EBITDA $46.5 - $49.5 million and $259 - $289 million respectively. Global-e is a platform powering global e-commerce and continues to excel in the market with strategic plans and strong financial performance.

data.title: Moody's will release Q4 earnings on Feb. 18, with analysts predicting $3.44 EPS, revenue $1.87B. Shares closed at $423.22.
data.description: Moody's Corporation (NYSE: MCO) is set to report its fourth-quarter earnings on February 18, with analysts anticipating earnings of $3.44 per share, up from $2.62 per share in the previous year. The consensus estimate for quarterly revenue is $1.87 billion, compared to $1.67 billion last year. Moody's recently announced the establishment of a regional headquarters in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. The company's stock closed at $423.22 on Tuesday, marking a 0.8% decrease. For latest analyst ratings on Moody's, readers can visit Benzinga's Analyst Stock Ratings page to sort by various criteria. Additional details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Generali Global Assistance named best for pre-existing conditions in travel insurance by Expert Consumers in 2026.
data.description: In the latest update dated February 18, 2026, Expert Consumers has commended Generali Global Assistance for providing an extensive range of benefits tailored for travelers with pre-existing medical conditions looking for travel insurance. The recognition specifically praises the Premium Plan for its comprehensive coverage and customer benefits. This acknowledgment sets Generali Global Assistance apart as a top choice for individuals with pre-existing medical conditions seeking protection during their travels.
